title: [VectorCombine] foldShuffleOfBinops - support multiple uses of shuffled binops
author: raventid

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64"

define <4 x i32> @test_recurse(<4 x i32> %l0, <4 x i32> %l1, <4 x i32> %l3) {
  %s0 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %l3, <4 x i32> %l1, <4 x i32> <i32 0, i32 2, i32 1, i32 5>
  %s1 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %l1, <4 x i32> %l3, <4 x i32> <i32 6, i32 1, i32 3, i32 0>
  %s2 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %l0, <4 x i32> %l1, <4 x i32> <i32 4, i32 2, i32 6, i32 2>
  %add = add <4 x i32> %s2, %s2
  %sub = sub <4 x i32> %s1, %s0
  %t0 = shufflevector <4 x i32> %add, <4 x i32> %add, <4 x i32> <i32 2, i32 0, i32 0, i32 3>
  ret <4 x i32> %t0
}

declare void @use(<4 x i32>)

define <4 x i32> @shuf_mul_v4i32_yy_use2(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> %z) {
  %b0 = mul <4 x i32> %x, %y
  %b1 = mul <4 x i32> %z, %y
  call void @use(<4 x i32> %b1)
  %r = shufflevector <4 x i32> %b0, <4 x i32> %b1, <4 x i32> <i32 1, i32 3, i32 5, i32 7>
  ret <4 x i32> %r
}

declare void @use(<4 x i32>)

define <4 x i32> @shuf_sdiv_v4i32_multiuse_rhs(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> %z) {
  %b0 = sdiv <4 x i32> %x, %y
  %b1 = sdiv <4 x i32> %z, %y
  call void @use(<4 x i32> %b1)
  %r = shufflevector <4 x i32> %b0, <4 x i32> %b1, <4 x i32> <i32 1, i32 3, i32 5, i32 7>
  ret <4 x i32> %r
}

declare void @use(<4 x i32>)

define <4 x i32> @shuf_sdiv_v4i32_multiuse_both(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> %z) {
  %b0 = sdiv <4 x i32> %x, %y
  %b1 = sdiv <4 x i32> %z, %y
  call void @use(<4 x i32> %b0)
  call void @use(<4 x i32> %b1)
  %r = shufflevector <4 x i32> %b0, <4 x i32> %b1, <4 x i32> <i32 1, i32 3, i32 5, i32 7>
  ret <4 x i32> %r
}

declare void @use(<4 x i32>)

define <4 x i32> @shuf_sdiv_v4i32_multiuse_lhs(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> %z) {
  %b0 = sdiv <4 x i32> %x, %y
  call void @use(<4 x i32> %b0)
  %b1 = sdiv <4 x i32> %z, %y
  %r = shufflevector <4 x i32> %b0, <4 x i32> %b1, <4 x i32> <i32 1, i32 3, i32 5, i32 7>
  ret <4 x i32> %r
}

declare void @use(<4 x i1>)

define <4 x i32> @shuf_icmp_ugt_v4i32_use(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> %z, <4 x i32> %w) {
  %c0 = icmp ugt <4 x i32> %x, %y
  %c1 = icmp ugt <4 x i32> %z, %w
  call void @use(<4 x i1> %c0)
  %s = shufflevector <4 x i1> %c0, <4 x i1> %c1, <4 x i32> <i32 1, i32 3, i32 5, i32 7>
  %r = sext <4 x i1> %s to <4 x i32>
  ret <4 x i32> %r
}

define <4 x i32> @shuf_icmp_eq_v4i64_v4i32_mismatch_type(<4 x i64> %x, <4 x i64> %y, <4 x i32> %z, <4 x i32> %w) {
  %b0 = icmp eq <4 x i64> %x, %y
  %b1 = icmp eq <4 x i32> %z, %w
  %s = shufflevector <4 x i1> %b0, <4 x i1> %b1, <4 x i32> <i32 3, i32 1, i32 1, i32 6>
  %r = sext <4 x i1> %s to <4 x i32>
  ret <4 x i32> %r
}
